query:
INSERT INTO academy_courses (houseId, moduleId, title, description, level, tokensReward, status) VALUES
-- House of Wonder (K-5) - houseId=1
(1, 1, 'Seeds of Wonder', 'Introduction to the natural world through observation and curiosity', 'foundational', 100, 'active'),
(1, 2, 'Counting Stars', 'Numbers, patterns, and shapes in nature', 'foundational', 100, 'active'),
(1, 6, 'First Words of Power', 'Learning to read, write, and speak with intention', 'foundational', 100, 'active'),
(1, 5, 'Little Gardeners', 'Growing plants and understanding where food comes from', 'foundational', 100, 'active'),
(1, 9, 'Colors of the Flame', 'Art, music, and creative expression for young minds', 'foundational', 100, 'active'),
-- House of Form (6-8) - houseId=2
(2, 1, 'Earth Systems & Cycles', 'Understanding ecosystems, weather, and natural cycles', 'developing', 200, 'active'),
(2, 2, 'Geometry of Creation', 'Sacred geometry, algebra, and mathematical reasoning', 'developing', 200, 'active'),
(2, 3, 'Code Foundations', 'Introduction to programming and digital creation', 'developing', 200, 'active'),
(2, 7, 'Young Entrepreneurs', 'Basic business concepts and first ventures', 'developing', 200, 'active'),
(2, 6, 'Voice & Story', 'Creative writing, public speaking, and oral tradition', 'developing', 200, 'active'),
-- House of Mastery (9-12) - houseId=3
(3, 1, 'Indigenous Science & Modern Research', 'Bridging ancestral knowledge with contemporary science', 'mastery', 500, 'active'),
(3, 2, 'Advanced Mathematics & Divine Patterns', 'Calculus, statistics, and sacred mathematical principles', 'mastery', 500, 'active'),
(3, 3, 'Full Stack Development & AI Ethics', 'Building applications with ethical AI considerations', 'mastery', 500, 'active'),
(3, 4, 'Sovereign Engineering', 'Designing solutions for community self-sufficiency', 'mastery', 500, 'active'),
(3, 7, 'Business Sovereignty', 'Building and managing businesses using LuvLedger principles', 'mastery', 500, 'active'),
(3, 5, 'Land Stewardship & Food Sovereignty', 'Advanced agriculture, permaculture, and land management', 'mastery', 500, 'active');
